title: OICPYD Reptile Birthday Invitations, Reptile Theme Jungle Wild One Birthday Party Invitations for Boys Girls Kids, Birthday Party Invites, Decorations, Favors, 20 Invitations with Envelopes (HA13)
features: Cards Size: Each cards measure 4" x 6". 20 Invitations Cards and 20 Envelopes per package.
Great Quality: Our Cards are made of good quality and thick cardstock paper, unique design. Our well-designed invitation cards will impress your guests.
Design with Heart: The front of the card has enough blank space to write, and the back of the card is blank for you to write your additional information.
4.Wonderful Feeling: When your guests receive a beautiful invitation card, they will be attracted by the design of the card, which will add fond memories to your party.
